=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:24-5:49) TS377016: `Effect.void` represents the same outcome as `Effect.succeed(undefined)` or `Effect.succeed(void 0)`. effect(effectSucceedWithVoid)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectSucceedWithVoid for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.void" ===

--- file:///.src/effectSucceedWithVoid_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics effectSucceedWithVoid:warning
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const preview = Effect.void
